一场空前惨烈的战争，即将爆发。而他，却阴差阳错地来到了这个时代，成为了这场战争的亲历者。他不知道自己的到来，会对历史产生什么样的影响。他也不知道自己能否在这个乱世中生存下去。
但他知道，他必须做点什么。至少，他要保护自己，保护身边的人。
1936年南京城，依旧喧嚣。夜幕降临，华灯初上。但在这喧嚣的背后，一场巨大的阴谋，正在悄然酝酿。林慕辰的命运，将与这座城市的命运，紧紧地联系在一起。
“暴风雨前的宁静，往往是最危险的时刻。在时代的洪流中，个人的命运如同风中浮萍，飘摇不定。而有些人，注定要成为时代的弄潮儿，在危机中崛起……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/656522c6b43561e645b7177575be873a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"如鱼得水","author_id":"","book_id":"7573609824772951064","book_name":"谍影：1937","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302010","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"15.1万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":973,"name":"战争军旅","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=973&name=战争军旅&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7573616520274644030","read_count":"16603","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2894800"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"713","tags":"精品小说,战争军旅","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/656522c6b43561e645b7177575be873a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433920&x-signature=Kj9hPh1AR1J5k6VNB2WEoBBreNo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231511595DF7199D43FA6A82D9E4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7080,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12572,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":530},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618809849721733912","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好的非常好的非常好的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773896995,"group_id":"7573609824772951064","service_id":2,"status":1
